texts.preview_head: dance with you. I want to dance with you, hold you in my arms once more, That's what they invented dancin' for, I just want to dance with you. I caught you lookin' at me when I looked at you, Yes I di
texts.preview_tail: walk away one step at a time It'll take you by surprise You'll think it happened over night It'll be too late when you realize Angels don't fly They just walk away one step at a time Don't think that
texts.full_text: dance with you. I want to dance with you, hold you in my arms once more, That's what they invented dancin' for, I just want to dance with you. I caught you lookin' at me when I looked at you, Yes I did, ain't that true? You won't get embarrassed by the things I do, I just want to dance with you. Oh the boys are playin' softly and the girls are too, So am I and so are you. If this was a movie, we'd be right on cue, I just want to dance with you. I want to dance with you, twirl you all around the floor That's what they intended dancin' for, I just want to dance with you. I want to dance with you, hold you in my arms once more, That's what they invented dancin' for, I just want to dance with you. I just want to dance with you, I just want to dance with you, I just want to dance with you. - Roger Cook, John Prine One Step At A Time I couldn't help but over hear your conversation When you told her that you owned her heart and soul You say you've got her wrapped around your finger But there's somthin' bout angels you should know She'll walk away one step at a time It'll take you by surprise You'll think it happened over night It'll be too late when you realize Angels don't fly They just walk away one step at a time Don't think that
